description: Complex enterprise multi-tier architecture with perimeter security, DMZ, and comprehensive monitoring

expected_attack_paths.rationale: Main attack path through web application tier, well-defended with DDoS protection and WAF
Partner access through API server, same perimeter defenses
Admin portal has direct database access - high-value target, no MFA mentioned
Cache server may contain sensitive session data or cached queries

ransomware.rationale: Good segmentation, database replication (availability), but no backup or EDR visible

application_vulns.rationale: Strong perimeter: DDoS protection, WAF, load balancer, reverse proxy. Well-architected.

phishing.rationale: No MFA mentioned, admin portal is high-value target

insider_threat.rationale: Good segmentation, monitoring present, but no access logging or least privilege visible

dos.rationale: Excellent DoS protection: DDoS mitigation, load balancer, reverse proxy, database replication

supply_chain.rationale: Message queue and multiple tiers = more dependencies, but segmentation helps contain

rationale: Well-designed enterprise architecture with defense-in-depth: Perimeter security (DDoS + WAF), DMZ (load balancer + reverse proxy), multi-tier application (separation of concerns), database replication (availability), monitoring. Key gaps: No MFA (admin portal risk), no EDR (detection gap), no backup visible (ransomware risk). Overall good security posture but room for improvement.
